requirement_summary: Intake is implemented as a bounded feasibility gate, not an audit or merits workflow
enforcement_method: determination routing and manifest scope controls

requirement_summary: Prohibited intake modes are not exposed as valid intake outputs
External output may express eligibility only and must not disclose internal execution depth
enforcement_method: external-output release gate and forbidden disclosure checks

requirement_summary: Matter-level context disclosure is allowed only through locked context terms
enforcement_method: mandatory term check and context leakage check

requirement_summary: Indirect signaling phrases are prohibited from external output
enforcement_method: indirect signaling check plus reviewer flag surface

requirement_summary: Implemented AFDM behavior is treated as source of truth for runtime artifacts
enforcement_method: implementation inventory and file presence audit

requirement_summary: Internal intake records must not contain evaluative fields or outcome-leaning metadata
enforcement_method: schema construction and record field allowlist

requirement_summary: Internal categories and terminology must avoid compliance, liability, finding, violation, and assessment framing
enforcement_method: record field discipline and forbidden-language checks

requirement_summary: Doctrine/implementation drift must be surfaced, not patched through improvised labels or fields
enforcement_method: Appendix F limitation disclosure and blocker register

requirement_summary: Mechanical neutrality is required in intake language
enforcement_method: forbidden framing and external output validation

requirement_summary: Banned external terms and functional equivalents are prohibited
enforcement_method: forbidden language validator and reviewer flag surface

requirement_summary: Blame/adversarial posture is prohibited
Mandatory scope and context terms must be exact when scope/context is described externally
Missing bounded target must be Insufficiently specified, not Constrained
Bounded narrowing may come only from complaint or demand materials provided
enforcement_method: anchor normalization and bounded target derivation discipline

requirement_summary: One insufficiently specified run unit must not freeze other bounded run units
enforcement_method: sequencing and stop logic permits bounded units to proceed

requirement_summary: BOTMITIGATION requires prevention of a meaningful bounded attempt, not marker presence alone
enforcement_method: constraint class validation and blocker evidence fields

requirement_summary: Exactly one of eight locked determination templates is permitted
Determination line must not reveal closeness, selections, observed/not observed results, or cap status
Peer-baseline eligibility and constrained-baseline templates must route correctly
enforcement_method: routing conditions and context scope checks

requirement_summary: Constraint-driven ineligibility must use BOTMITIGATION or OTHER constraint templates, not generic ineligibility
Maximum of 10 intake runs per matter
One run equals one controlled attempt of one asserted condition under one context
enforcement_method: run record construction and sequence mapping

requirement_summary: Only Observed as asserted and Not observed as asserted qualify as confirmations
Sufficiency requires two qualifying confirmations from distinct runs
Stop immediately at sufficiency or run cap and do not resume without new scope
Constrained and insufficient runs consume run-cap slots but do not qualify as confirmations
Complaint structure is preserved through locked complaint group anchors
Distinct asserted conditions become distinct run units with no blended execution
Run-unit normalization precedes execution
Unexecuted run units may remain in the manifest and are not an error condition
Mixed boundedness must preserve bounded execution for sufficiently bounded run units
enforcement_method: bounded execution preservation under sequencing/stop logic

requirement_summary: Target URL/page/element hints may be derived only from submitted materials
Only four locked outcome labels are permitted
Observed as asserted has the locked meaning
Not observed as asserted has the locked meaning
Constrained requires bounded target, technical blocker, prevention of meaningful attempt, and locked constraint class
Insufficiently specified is for missing bounded specification, not missing implementation coverage
enforcement_method: boundedness classification exists; unsupported probe coverage still requires hardening

requirement_summary: Each run has exactly one locked outcome label
Desktop and Mobile are fixed parameter locks, not approximations
Desktop baseline is 1366 x 900, zoom 100%, DPR 1, landscape, non-mobile, no touch
Mobile baseline is 393 x 852, zoom 100%, DPR 1, portrait, mobile, touch
Generic accessibility allegations bring both Desktop and Mobile into scope unless expressly cabined
Reflow methods remain separate and do not alter Desktop/Mobile baselines
enforcement_method: reflow profile isolation from baseline profiles

requirement_summary: Notes are permitted only under locked gates
Notes are prohibited for observed/not observed runs and sufficiency/run-order explanations
Permitted notes must be exactly one mechanical sentence with no legal/evaluative/blame/speculation language
Constraint class enum is AUTHWALL, BOTMITIGATION, GEOBLOCK, HARDCRASH, NAVIMPEDIMENT only
Unmapped blockers must not be labeled Constrained
Note basis enum is locked and no additional note basis values are permitted
When both baselines are in scope, runs alternate Desktop/Mobile until stop
Each run uses fresh isolated browser context and state persistence failures are classified
Run timing metadata is internal only and must not surface externally
enforcement_method: internal run record fields and external leakage gate

requirement_summary: IntakeRunRecord required fields and constraints are enforced
ComplaintGroupAnchorRecord required fields and locked anchor types are enforced
RunUnitRecord required fields, context scope booleans, and created_context_basis are enforced
enforcement_method: run unit builder and scope assignment

requirement_summary: IntakeDeterminationRecord required fields and matter-level note gate are enforced
IntakeManifestRecord resolves runs, run units, anchors, determination, and internal metadata
MechanicalNoteRuleRecord fields and note permission basis are enforced
ContextProfileRecord values match locked Desktop, Mobile, and reflow baselines
SequencingRecord captures run sequence, baseline scope, and stop basis
StateIsolationRecord captures fresh context and storage persistence status
ExternalOutputValidationRecord captures release gate, forbidden language, mandatory terms, context leakage, and reviewer flags
Required test coverage is present for current implemented slice
test_identifier: local validation 2026-05-07: node --test all discovered test files

requirement_summary: Appendix D fixture evidence is present for D.1-D.13, with D.14-D.17 scaffolded for follow-up hardening
enforcement_method: fixture inventory and local test evidence

requirement_summary: Golden artifact verification must show named cases, expected state, validation result, and reference resolution
test_identifier: local validation 2026-05-07: node --test all discovered test files

requirement_summary: Traceability matrix must provide doctrine, implementation, test, fixture, status, and limitation mapping
